name: Cream of Broccoli Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring the onion, broccoli, chicken broth, and water to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
3. Add the chicken bouillon, butter, and flour to the soup. Stir until combined.
4. Gradually add the evaporated milk, Velveita, and bacon into the pot.
5. Simmer for an additional 10-15 minutes or until all ingredients are well incorporated.
